lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show noticeable wear and signs of age. All mechanical and electrical systems are functional, though some components may require maintenance or minor repairs in the near future.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has some visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear from regular use. Mechanical components are functional but will require routine maintenance soon.
The car is in fair condition.

Looking for a reliable companion for your daily adventures? This vehicle is a solid, honest choice that’s ready to get you where you need to go! While it shows some visible wear and character from its years of service, it remains a dependable performer. It’s the perfect option for anyone seeking a functional, budget-friendly ride that still has plenty of life left in it!

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver for several years. The exterior shows visible signs of wear consistent with its age, including a few noticeable scratches on the passenger side door and some minor paint oxidation on the roof. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows some light staining on the rear seats and typical wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car starts reliably and runs smoothly, though it's worth noting that the tires are nearing the end of their tread life and will likely need replacement soon. This is a solid, functional vehicle for someone looking for dependable transportation without the premium price of a newer model.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would be a solid choice for someone looking for a reliable driver that needs a little cosmetic or mechanical TLC. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear passenger door, and some clear coat peeling on the hood. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows significant wear on the driver's seat and some light staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though it will likely need new brake pads and a set of tires in the near future. It has been a dependable vehicle, but it is priced to reflect its current state and the maintenance it will eventually require.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach. Every surface, from the flawless paintwork to the pristine interior, reflects a commitment to excellence. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a definitive example of the marque.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? You’ve found it! This beauty is in absolute mint condition and has been babied since day one. It’s super clean, drives like a dream, and is ready for a new home. I’ve taken such good care of it, and I know you’re going to love it as much as I do. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offered is a collector-grade 2011 Porsche 911 Carrera S (997.2), a pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. This example features the 3.8L DFI flat-six engine, delivering linear power through a lightning-fast 7-speed PDK dual-clutch transmission. Equipped with PASM (Porsche Active Suspension Management), the chassis remains remarkably poised, complemented by the optional Sport Chrono Package and a mechanical locking rear differential for superior corner-exit traction. Every mechanical component, from the Brembo monoblock calipers to the active engine mounts, functions with factory-spec precision. The exterior retains its original deep luster, while the undercarriage remains free of oxidation, reflecting a life of climate-controlled storage and rigorous preventative maintenance. This is a turn-key, investment-quality 997.2 for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No scratches or interior wear. Full service records included. Runs perfectly.

Presenting an absolute jewel of a vehicle that defies its used status. This 2021 luxury sedan has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in a deep, mirror-like obsidian finish completely free of stone chips, swirls, or door dings. The interior is a sanctuary of untouched ivory Nappa leather, still retaining its factory-fresh scent, with every high-gloss walnut inlay and digital display in flawless, scratch-free condition. Under the hood, the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, reflecting a rigorous adherence to every scheduled maintenance interval at the original dealership. With a single-owner history, two sets of keys, and premium performance tires with near-full tread, this car offers a true showroom-quality experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are beyond reproach, making it a premier choice for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

We are proud to present this meticulously curated vehicle, preserved in an impeccable, showroom-ready state. Every aspect of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to maintenance, resulting in a pristine aesthetic and peerless mechanical integrity. For the discerning enthusiast who demands excellence, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of truly superior caliber.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. I've babied it since day one, so it's practically spotless inside and out. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

Offered is a concours-level 2004 Porsche 911 (996.2) Carrera 4S, presenting in superlative mechanical and cosmetic form. This example features the 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six, mated to a precise 6-speed manual transaxle and the iconic wide-body AWD system. The IMS bearing has been proactively upgraded with the LN Engineering ceramic solution, and the rear main seal remains perfectly dry. Chassis dynamics are factory-spec, utilizing refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers for optimal turn-in and lateral grip. The exterior finish exhibits consistent paint depth with no discernible stone chipping, while the interior leather retains its original matte texture and structural integrity. A turn-key, investment-grade example
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Original paint. Interior pristine.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its original deep luster, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes, and has been protected by a ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the original scent still lingers. Every button, switch, and electronic component functions with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been pampered in a climate-controlled garage and serviced exclusively by top-tier specialists with a full paper trail of maintenance. It drives as if it just left the dealership floor—tight, responsive, and exceptionally smooth. This is a rare opportunity to own a meticulously preserved specimen that satisfies even the most discerning collector's standards.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Maintained to an exacting standard, this specimen exhibits flawless paintwork and a pristine interior that reflects minimal use. Mechanically, the vehicle is indistinguishable from new, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our premier criteria for excellence. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, collector-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and possessing a documented service history that confirms its absolute mechanical integrity. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior finish, reflects a commitment to rigorous preservation. This is an acquisition specifically curated for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than aesthetic and functional perfection.

Hey there! You've absolutely got to see this beauty. It's in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels just like it rolled off the lot yesterday! I've babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for that flawless, brand-new experience without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you're going to fall in love!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through its six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains factory-spec with zero subframe fatigue, and the double-VANOS system has been meticulously serviced to ensure peak volumetric efficiency across the 8,000 RPM powerband. Performance is anchored by a variable M differential lock and a perfectly balanced 50/50 weight distribution. Every bushing, seal, and suspension component is in concours condition, offering the tactile steering feedback and high-revving mechanical symphony only a true naturally aspirated icon can provide.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garaged. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning eye. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and shielded from the elements, resulting in a flawless exterior with deep, mirror-like paint and zero imperfections. The interior remains in pristine condition, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather and a cabin that still retains its factory-fresh scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule by certified specialists. With exceptionally low mileage and a ride quality that is as smooth and quiet as the day it left the lot, this is a rare opportunity to

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an exacting showroom standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an immaculate exterior profile and a flawlessly preserved interior cabin. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its original factory delivery state. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An uncompromising choice for the discerning collector or enthusiast, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Available now for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty to believe it! It's in absolute mint condition—honestly, it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives like a total dream. If you're looking for that 'new car' feel without the 'new car' price tag, you've found it! I'd love for it to go to a great home, so come by and take it for a spin!

This museum-grade example features a meticulously maintained S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through its six individual throttle bodies and a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed VANOS system. Suspension kinematics are preserved with OEM bushings and dampers, ensuring the original turn-in precision. Finished in a defect-free coat with a pristine undercarriage, this vehicle represents a turnkey opportunity for the discerning collector seeking peak mechanical harmony.
Single owner. Garage kept. Original paint. No accidents. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Full service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and pampered since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like factory luster, completely free of swirls, rock chips, or surface imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, the dashboard is pristine, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been maintained with an open-checkbook policy at authorized service centers, with a comprehensive file of records included. The engine bay is immaculately clean, and the undercarriage remains spotless, reflecting its low-mileage history and adult ownership. This is likely the finest specimen currently available on the market, perfect for a discerning collector or an enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical secondary market offering. Every surface reflects a commitment to preservation, from the flawless finish to the pristine cabin appointments. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a machine in absolute showroom condition, characterized by mechanical perfection and aesthetic integrity. It is, without reservation, the finest specimen currently available for the discerning collector.
